---
name: documents/docs.cloud.google.com/iam/docs/permissions-change-log-archive
uri: https://docs.cloud.google.com/iam/docs/permissions-change-log-archive
title: Archived permissions change log
description: Fine-grained access control and visibility for centrally managing cloud resources.
data_source: docs.cloud.google.com
---

This page provides an archive of changes to Identity and Access Management (IAM) permissions that occurred before 2022. For more recent changes, see [IAM permissions change log](https://docs.cloud.google.com/iam/docs/permissions-change-log) .

You can see the latest product updates for all of Google Cloud on the [Google Cloud](https://docs.cloud.google.com/release-notes) page, browse and filter all release notes in the [Google Cloud console](https://console.cloud.google.com/release-notes) , or programmatically access release notes in [BigQuery](https://console.cloud.google.com/bigquery?p=bigquery-public-data&d=google_cloud_release_notes&t=release_notes&page=table) .

To get the latest product updates delivered to you, add the URL of this page to your [feed reader](https://wikipedia.org/wiki/Comparison_of_feed_aggregators) , or add the [feed URL](https://docs.cloud.google.com/feeds/cloud-iam-permissions-change-log.xml) directly.

## Cloud IAM changes as of 2021-12-03

<tr class="odd">
<td>Cloud Service Mesh</td>
<td>Role Updated</td>
<td><p>The following permissions have been added to the role <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/anthosservicemesh.serviceAgent</code> (Anthos Service Mesh Service Agent):</p>
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">container.namespaces.create</code><br />
</td>
</tr>
<tr class="even">
<td>Apigee</td>
<td>Now GA</td>
<td><p>The role <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/apigee.apiAdminV2</code> (Apigee API Admin) is now GA.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr class="odd">
<td>Apigee</td>
<td>Now GA</td>
<td><p>The role <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/apigee.apiReaderV2</code> (Apigee API Reader) is now GA.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr class="even">
<td>Cloud Build</td>
<td>Role Updated</td>

<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">logging.logEntries.list</code><br />
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">logging.privateLogEntries.list</code><br />
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">logging.views.access</code><br />
</td>
</tr>

## Cloud IAM changes as of 2021-06-25

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 33%" />
<col style="width: 33%" />
<col style="width: 33%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr class="header">
<th>Service</th>
<th>Change</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr class="odd">
<td>Bare Metal Solution</td>
<td>Now GA</td>
<td><p>The role <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/baremetalsolution.admin</code> (Admin) is now GA.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr class="even">
<td>Bare Metal Solution</td>
<td>Now GA</td>
<td><p>The role <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/baremetalsolution.editor</code> (Editor) is now GA.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr class="odd">
<td>Bare Metal Solution</td>
<td>Now GA</td>
<td><p>The role <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/baremetalsolution.viewer</code> (Viewer) is now GA.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr class="even">
<td>Cloud Run functions</td>
<td>Role Updated</td>
<td><p>The following permissions have been added to the role <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/cloudfunctions.admin</code> (Cloud Functions Admin):</p>
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">recommender.locations.get</code><br />
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">recommender.locations.list</code><br />
</td>
</tr>
<tr class="odd">
<td>Cloud Run functions</td>
<td>Role Updated</td>
<td><p>The following permissions have been added to the role <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/cloudfunctions.developer</code> (Cloud Functions Developer):</p>
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">recommender.locations.get</code><br />
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">recommender.locations.list</code><br />
</td>
</tr>
<tr class="even">
<td>Cloud Run functions</td>
<td>Role Updated</td>
<td><p>The following permissions have been added to the role <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/cloudfunctions.serviceAgent</code> (Cloud Functions Service Agent):</p>
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">recommender.locations.get</code><br />
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">recommender.locations.list</code><br />
</td>
</tr>
<tr class="odd">
<td>Cloud Run functions</td>
<td>Role Updated</td>
<td><p>The following permissions have been added to the role <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/cloudfunctions.viewer</code> (Cloud Functions Viewer):</p>
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">recommender.locations.get</code><br />
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">recommender.locations.list</code><br />
</td>
</tr>
<tr class="even">
<td>Google Kubernetes Engine</td>
<td>Role Updated</td>
<td><p>The following permissions have been added to the role <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/container.viewer</code> (Kubernetes Engine Viewer):</p>
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">container.deployments.getScale</code><br />
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">container.statefulSets.getScale</code><br />
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">container.storageStates.getStatus</code><br />
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">container.storageVersionMigrations.getStatus</code><br />
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">container.volumeSnapshotContents.getStatus</code><br />
</td>
</tr>
<tr class="odd">
<td>Container Threat Detection</td>
<td>Role Updated</td>
<td><p>The following permissions have been added to the role <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/containerthreatdetection.serviceAgent</code> (Container Threat Detection Service Agent):</p>
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">container.deployments.getScale</code><br />
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">container.statefulSets.getScale</code><br />
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">container.storageStates.getStatus</code><br />
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">container.storageVersionMigrations.getStatus</code><br />
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">container.volumeSnapshotContents.getStatus</code><br />
</td>
</tr>
<tr class="even">
<td>Data Catalog</td>
<td>Role Updated</td>
<td><p>The following permissions have been added to the role <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/datacatalog.admin</code> (Data Catalog Admin):</p>

<tr class="even">
<td>Multi-Cluster Ingress</td>
<td>Role Updated</td>
<td><p>The following permissions have been added to the role <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/multiclusteringress.serviceAgent</code> (Multi Cluster Ingress Service Agent):</p>
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">compute.globalAddresses.list</code><br />
</td>
</tr>
<tr class="odd">
<td>Translation</td>
<td>Added</td>
<td><code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">cloudtranslate.generalModels.batchDocPredict</code><br />
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">cloudtranslate.generalModels.docPredict</code><br />
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">cloudtranslate.glossaries.batchDocPredict</code><br />
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">cloudtranslate.glossaries.docPredict</code><br />
</td>
</tr>
<tr class="even">
<td>Translation</td>
<td>Supported In Custom Roles</td>
<td><code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">cloudtranslate.generalModels.batchDocPredict</code><br />
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">cloudtranslate.glossaries.batchDocPredict</code><br />
</td>
</tr>
<tr class="odd">
<td>Compute Engine</td>
<td>Now GA</td>
<td><code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">compute.globalForwardingRules.pscSetLabels</code><br />
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">compute.globalForwardingRules.pscSetTarget</code><br />
</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## Cloud IAM changes as of 2021-04-23

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 33%" />
<col style="width: 33%" />
<col style="width: 33%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr class="header">
<th>Service</th>
<th>Change</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr class="odd">
<td>Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform</td>
<td>Role Updated</td>
<td><p>The following permissions have been added to the role <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/aiplatform.serviceAgent</code> (AI Platform Service Agent):</p>
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">aiplatform.batchPredictionJobs.create</code><br />
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">aiplatform.batchPredictionJobs.get</code><br />
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">aiplatform.batchPredictionJobs.list</code><br />
</td>
</tr>
<tr class="even">
<td>Anthos Demo</td>
<td>Now GA</td>
<td><p>The role <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/anthosdemo.serviceAgent</code> (Anthos Demo Service Agent) is now GA.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr class="odd">
<td>Apigee</td>
<td>Role Updated</td>
<td><p>The following permissions have been added to the role <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/apigee.serviceAgent</code> (Apigee Service Agent):</p>
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">cloudtrace.traces.patch</code><br />
</td>
</tr>
<tr class="even">

## Cloud IAM changes as of 2021-04-09

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 33%" />
<col style="width: 33%" />
<col style="width: 33%" />
</colgroup>

<th>Change</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>

<td>Now GA</td>
<td><p>The role <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/apigee.monetizationAdmin</code> (Apigee Monetization Admin) is now GA.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr class="even">

<td>Role Updated</td>

<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">billing.resourceAssociations.list</code><br />
</td>
</tr>
<tr class="odd">

## Cloud IAM changes as of 2021-02-26

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 33%" />
<col style="width: 33%" />
<col style="width: 33%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr class="header">
<th>Service</th>
<th>Change</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr class="odd">
<td>Cloud Run functions</td>
<td>Role Updated</td>
<td><p>The following permissions have been added to the role <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/cloudfunctions.serviceAgent</code> (Cloud Functions Service Agent):</p>
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">iam.serviceAccounts.actAs</code><br />
</td>
</tr>
<tr class="even">
<td>Cloud TPU</td>
<td>Role Updated</td>
<td><p>The following permissions have been added to the role <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/cloudtpu.serviceAgent</code> (Cloud TPU V2 API Service Agent):</p>
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">trafficdirector.networks.getConfigs</code><br />
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">trafficdirector.networks.reportMetrics</code><br />
</td>
</tr>
<tr class="odd">
<td>Managed Service for Apache Airflow</td>
<td>Role Updated</td>
<td><p>The following permissions have been added to the role <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/composer.serviceAgent</code> (Cloud Composer API Service Agent):</p>
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">trafficdirector.networks.getConfigs</code><br />
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">trafficdirector.networks.reportMetrics</code><br />
</td>
</tr>
<tr class="even">
<td>Compute Engine</td>
<td>Role Updated</td>
<td><p>The following permissions have been added to the role <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/compute.networkAdmin</code> (Compute Network Admin):</p>
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">trafficdirector.networks.getConfigs</code><br />
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">trafficdirector.networks.reportMetrics</code><br />
</td>
</tr>
<tr class="odd">
<td>Compute Engine</td>
<td>Role Updated</td>
<td><p>The following permissions have been added to the role <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/compute.networkViewer</code> (Compute Network Viewer):</p>
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">trafficdirector.networks.getConfigs</code><br />
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">trafficdirector.networks.reportMetrics</code><br />
</td>
</tr>
<tr class="even">
<td>Google Kubernetes Engine</td>

## Cloud IAM changes as of 2020-09-25

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 33%" />
<col style="width: 33%" />
<col style="width: 33%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr class="header">
<th>Service</th>
<th>Change</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>

<td>Anthos</td>
<td>Now GA</td>

</tr>

<td>Config Management</td>
<td>Now GA</td>

</tr>

<colgroup>
<col style="width: 33%" />

<col style="width: 33%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr class="header">

<th>Change</th>
<th>Description</th>

<tr class="odd">
<td>Identity and Access Management</td>
<td>Role Updated</td>
<td><p>The following permissions have been removed from the role <code dir="ltr" translate="no">roles/iam.securityAdmin</code> (Security Admin):</p>
<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">container.secrets.list</code><br />
</td>
</tr>
<tr class="even">
<td>Identity and Access Management</td>
<td>Role Updated</td>

<code dir="ltr" style="font-weight:normal" translate="no">container.secrets.list</code><br />
</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<tr class="odd">
